sellSection.front_view_desc: Clear frontal view of the product
sellSection.back_view_desc: Back or side view showing different angles
sellSection.closeup_desc: Detailed close-up showing condition and details
sellSection.damage_condition_desc: Any visible damage, wear, or defects (if applicable)
sellSection.additional_views_desc: Any other helpful angles or details
sellSection.recommended_images: Add at least 3 photos: front, back, and side of the product.
sellSection.add_one_more: Add one more photo (close-up or detail view recommended).
sellSection.image_quality_excellent: Great quality! This image looks good.
sellSection.image_aspect_ratio_extreme: Image is very narrow or wide - consider a more balanced aspect ratio
sellSection.achievement_message: Great job! Your listing has excellent image coverage
sellSection.photography_tip_lighting_desc: Use natural daylight. Avoid harsh shadows and backlighting. Position the product near a window.
sellSection.photography_tip_background_desc: Use a plain, neutral background. White or light gray works best. Avoid clutter.
sellSection.photography_tip_angles_desc: Show the product from at least 3 different angles. Include top, side, and front views.
sellSection.photography_tip_details_desc: Capture close-ups of important details, textures, and any wear or damage.
sellSection.photography_tip_sharpness_desc: Keep your camera steady. Use good focus. Avoid blurry images. High contrast improves visibility.
sellSection.photography_tip_scale_desc: Include reference objects or hands for scale. Helps buyers understand the size.
sellSection.photography_tip_packaging_desc: Show original packaging and accessories if included. This increases buyer confidence.
sellSection.photography_tip_honesty_desc: Clearly show any damage, wear, or defects. Honest photos build trust and reduce returns.
sellSection.quality_success_message: ✓ Excellent! This image meets quality standards.
sellSection.gps_preview_hint: GPS coordinates are accurate even if image preview is unavailable.

productDetail.safety1: Never make a payment until the item is in your hands.
productDetail.safety2: Arrange meetings in public or safe places.
productDetail.safety3: Inspect the product carefully before agreeing to buy.
productDetail.safety4: Only complete payment after confirming the item is as described.
productDetail.safety5: Avoid sharing card details on unfamiliar websites or suspicious links.

safety_tips.title: Safety tips
safety_tips.hero_copy: Follow these best practices for safer buying, selling, and trading in the marketplace.
safety_tips.tip1_body: Choose well-lit public locations such as cafes, malls, or police-adjacent pickup points when meeting buyers or sellers.
safety_tips.tip2_body: Check the product condition, accessories, serial numbers, and functionality before handing over cash or confirming transfer.
safety_tips.tip3_body: Be cautious if someone rushes you to continue on private channels, asks for unusual deposits, or avoids answering basic questions.
safety_tips.tip4_body: For trades, confirm photos, condition, and expected exchange terms in chat before meeting so both sides have a written record.
safety_tips.tip5_body: Do not share verification codes, passwords, or payment credentials. Update your password if you suspect unauthorized access.
safety_tips.tip6_body: Use the report flow when you see prohibited items, scam behavior, fake products, or unsafe communication from another user.

terms.title: Terms and Policies
terms.intro: These terms are provided for the current PhsarOne demo build and describe how users are expected to use the marketplace.
terms.section1_body: PhsarOne is a local marketplace for buying, selling, and trading products between users. By using the app, you agree to act honestly, provide accurate listing details, and respect other users during transactions.
terms.section2_body: You are responsible for the listings you publish. Titles, images, prices, and product details must reasonably match the item being offered. Misleading listings, impersonation, spam, or repeated false information may result in content removal or account restriction.
terms.section3_body: Users must not post illegal, dangerous, counterfeit, stolen, or prohibited items. This includes narcotics, weapons prohibited by local law, fraudulent documents, and products intended to deceive or harm buyers. PhsarOne may remove such content and restrict accounts without notice.
terms.section4_body: Buyers and sellers are expected to verify product condition, arrange safe meetup locations, and communicate clearly before payment or handoff. PhsarOne is not the direct seller of listed items and does not guarantee the quality, safety, or legality of third-party listings.
terms.section5_body: Subscriptions, boosts, and premium features are billed according to the plan selected in the app. Access to paid features may change if a plan expires, is cancelled, or becomes inactive at the end of the billing period.
terms.section6_body: We collect account information, listing content, usage activity, and messages necessary to operate the marketplace. This data is used to provide search, personalization, trust and safety checks, customer support, and account management. We do not sell private user message content as advertising inventory.
terms.section7_body: PhsarOne may review reports, moderate listings, and investigate suspicious activity to protect the marketplace. We may suspend or remove content, restrict features, or disable accounts where we believe platform abuse or policy violations have occurred.
terms.section8_body: PhsarOne is provided on an as-is basis. To the extent permitted by law, we are not liable for indirect losses, failed transactions between users, or third-party conduct that occurs through off-platform arrangements.
terms.section9_body: We may update these terms and policies as the marketplace changes. Continued use of the app after updates means you accept the revised terms.
